TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjukuvulj ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 115 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 113 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 76%, Rukay 12%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjukuvulj hya' ga Tjusepayuan. tay mkyahu' na Tjukuvulj hya' ga Kingdalruwane. tay 'zil na Tjukuvulj hya' ga Sagaran. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tjuku*ulj …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu s~…ēantimon …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, rukaj **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na tjuku*ulj ńßja Ē …£a tjus~…ēepajuan. taj mkjańßu Ē na tjuku*ulj ńßja Ē …£a kiŇč*alruwane. taj Ēzil na tjuku*ulj ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēa…£aran. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Tjukuvulj ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 115 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 113 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 76%, Rukay 12%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjukuvulj hya' ga Tjusepayuan. tay mkyahu' na Tjukuvulj hya' ga Kingdalruwane. tay 'zil na Tjukuvulj hya' ga Sagaran. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
